feat.name: Replenishment of War
feat.prerequisite: expert in your deity’s favored weapon
feat.text: Striking out against your enemies draws praise and protection from your deity. When you damage a creature with a Strike using your deity’s favored weapon, you gain a number of temporary Hit Points equal to half your level, or equal to your level if the Strike was a critical hit. These temporary Hit Points last until the start of your next turn.

traits.name: Cleric
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the cleric class.
